Index.title: Kalmeron — Your Complete AI Founding Team
Index.description: 57 specialised AI assistants across 7 departments work as your complete founding team — analysing your market, building your financial models, and guiding every decision. Start today, free.

Common.tagline: Your intelligent partner in building your company

CTA.primarySignup: Start free — no credit card required
CTA.buildFirstDept: Build your first department in 5 minutes
CTA.returnLogin: Welcome back — your team is waiting

hero.subtitleLead: Instead of spending thousands on financial advisors, lawyers, and market analysts,
hero.subtitleTail: work across 7 departments as your full team — analysing your market, planning with you, and guiding every decision.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Write your idea or question — Kalmeron is ready…

suggestions.platform: Analyse a learning platform idea for freelancers in my market
suggestions.ecommerce: Build a complete business plan for my online store
suggestions.healthtech: What are the best opportunities in digital health right now?
suggestions.cloudKitchen: Calculate startup costs and break-even for a cloud kitchen

sidebar.noConversations: No conversations yet — ask your first question
sidebar.secureFooter: Your conversations are fully protected and encrypted

ideaAnalyst.label: Idea Analyst
ideaAnalyst.prompt: Run a comprehensive analysis of my idea — market size, competitors, real opportunities, and the risks I need to know.

businessPlan.label: Business Plan
businessPlan.prompt: Help me build a professional, investor-ready business plan with financial projections, target market, and a growth strategy.

mistakeShield.label: Risk Shield
mistakeShield.prompt: What are the most costly mistakes founders make at my stage, and how do I avoid them before they become failures?

opportunityRadar.label: Opportunity Radar
opportunityRadar.prompt: Tell me about the latest funding rounds, grants, competitions, and startup events in my sector and region.

cfo.label: AI CFO
cfo.prompt: Build me a preliminary financial model with break-even analysis, runway calculation, and first-year revenue projections.

legal.label: Legal Guide
legal.prompt: What are the legal steps to incorporate my company and protect its intellectual property? What documents can't I skip?

emptyState.description: 57 specialised AI assistants across 7 departments at your service — they analyse your ideas, build your financial plans, and guide every strategic decision. Ask me anything.

suggestions.pharmacy: Analyse my pharmacy-delivery app idea for my market
suggestions.marketing: Build a marketing plan for a new product I want to launch
suggestions.saas: What are the step-by-step requirements to build a SaaS company from scratch?
suggestions.breakeven: Calculate the break-even for my project with limited startup capital
suggestions.company: Explain the practical difference between company structures and which fits my situation
suggestions.subscription: Is a book Subscription Box a viable idea? Let's analyse it with numbers

toasts.fileExtracted: Content extracted and added to the conversation.
toasts.fileTooLarge: File exceeds the 10 MB size limit.
toasts.fileError: Could not process the file — please try again.
toasts.messageTooLong: Message is too long — shorten it slightly and resend.
toasts.genericError: An unexpected error occurred — please try again.

LearnedSkills.title: Learned Skills
LearnedSkills.subtitle: Kalmeron learns and improves with every task — skills accumulate automatically and are reused for better performance every time.
LearnedSkills.empty: No skills distilled yet — they will be built automatically after each successful task.

details.noEvolution: No evolution chain yet — this is a first-generation skill.

ApiKeys.title: API Keys
ApiKeys.intro: Connect Kalmeron to your external systems via secure API keys. Create a key, scope its permissions, and use it from your application or platform.
ApiKeys.scopesTitle: What you can build with the API

scopes.agents: Run AI assistants on your own data
scopes.documents: Upload and index documents in your knowledge base
scopes.webhooks: Subscribe to real-time events and notifications

Webhooks.title: Webhooks
Webhooks.intro: Receive instant notifications the moment any important event occurs in your account. Power full automation, integrations, and monitoring dashboards.

events.agentActionExecuted: An AI assistant executed an action
events.approvalRequested: A new approval request needs your decision

CashRunway.title: Cash Runway Calculator
CashRunway.subtitle: Know in seconds how many months you have before your cash runs out — and plan your next move with confidence before time runs out.
CashRunway.result: You have {months} months of runway left
CashRunway.warning: ⚠️ Warning: less than 6 months — review your financial model and consider fundraising now.
CashRunway.healthy: ✅ Healthy position — keep growing and build your reserve.
CashRunway.infinite: 🚀 Your cash is growing — you are in an excellent position.
CashRunway.noBurn: Enter a valid monthly burn figure to compute your runway.
CashRunway.noCash: Your balance is zero — enter your figures or act immediately.
CashRunway.warningBelow: Less than {months} months — daily alerts will appear on your dashboard.
CashRunway.urgentActions: Actions you can take this week
CashRunway.alarmThresholdLabel: Alert me when runway drops below
CashRunway.alarmThresholdHint: An alert will appear on your dashboard when your balance falls below this threshold. Set it to 6 months for a useful action window.

Wellbeing.title: Founder Energy Quotient
Wellbeing.subtitle: Five minutes to gauge your mental wellbeing as a founder. Your answers are completely private — no one sees them.
Wellbeing.pageSubtitle: Building a startup is a long journey — your wellbeing is your most valuable asset.
Wellbeing.assessmentDesc: 6 questions + personalised AI analysis for where you are right now
Wellbeing.checkinDesc: Write how you feel and your coach responds with exactly what you need to hear
Wellbeing.stat2t: of failures stem from founder burnout, not the product
Wellbeing.stat3t: higher performance when mental health is prioritised

qSubs.energy: How do you feel — physically and mentally?
qSubs.sleep: Are you sleeping well and waking refreshed?
qSubs.focus: Can you focus on what matters?
qSubs.purpose: Does your work feel genuinely meaningful?
qSubs.social: Do you have people who support and listen to you?

Wellbeing.checkinHint: Write honestly about how you feel — joy, anxiety, exhaustion, excitement. Your coach is here.
Wellbeing.checkinPlaceholder: Example: Today was heavy — a difficult team meeting and deadline pressure...
Wellbeing.contextPlaceholder: e.g. This week I had a disagreement with my co-founder, or last month was tough...

questions.sleep: How was your sleep quality this past week?
questions.energy: How would you describe your daily energy level when you start work?
questions.focus: Can you focus for two consecutive hours on a single task without distraction?
questions.support: Do you have someone you trust to talk to about the pressures of building a company?
questions.purpose: Are you still excited about your company's vision five years from now?

results.thrive: 🌟 Thriving — keep your routine and protect your energy.
results.stable: ⚡ Stable — there's room to improve rest and your support circle.
results.atRisk: 🔴 At risk — take a day off and talk to someone you trust before pushing forward.

FinancialModel.title: AI Financial Model
FinancialModel.subtitle: Financial projections, break-even analysis, and profit margins powered by AI
FinancialModel.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. SaaS platform for restaurant management, monthly subscription 500 EGP/restaurant, targeting 200 restaurants in year one...

LegalAI.title: AI Legal Advisor
LegalAI.subtitle: Simplified legal guidance for Egyptian startups
LegalAI.disclaimer: ⚖️ Disclaimer: This information is for general guidance only and is not specialised legal advice. Consult a licensed attorney for important legal matters.

contract.label: Contract Drafting
contract.desc: Simplified contract drafts under Egyptian law

descriptionPlaceholders.contract: e.g. Full-time developer employment contract, salary 15,000 EGP, one year renewable...
descriptionPlaceholders.compliance: e.g. SaaS company collecting data from Egyptian clients — what are the legal obligations?
descriptionPlaceholders.ip: e.g. I have a mobile app and want to protect the code and trademark...
descriptionPlaceholders.disputes: e.g. A client hasn't paid an invoice for 3 months despite repeated reminders...

TermSheet.title: Term Sheet Analyzer
TermSheet.subtitle: Understand every clause in an investment offer before signing — paste the text or upload a PDF
TermSheet.disclaimer: This analysis is for general guidance only. Consult a specialist attorney for investment deals before signing any legal document.
TermSheet.textareaPlaceholder: Paste the Term Sheet text here... (Arabic, English, or mixed)
TermSheet.dragDropText: Drag a PDF here or click to choose
TermSheet.pdfOnlyError: Please upload a PDF file only

SmartPricing.title: Smart Pricing Strategy
SmartPricing.subtitle: Get the optimal pricing strategy for the Egyptian and Arab market
SmartPricing.productPlaceholder: e.g. SaaS inventory management platform for restaurants, saving 2–3 hours of work per day...
SmartPricing.competitorsPlaceholder: e.g. Competitor A = 500 EGP/month, Competitor B = 300 EGP/month

EgyptCalc.title: Egyptian All-in-One Calculator
EgyptCalc.subtitle: Accurate calculations based on the latest Egyptian tax and social insurance laws · Data updated 2025

labels.annualGrossInfo: Personal exemption: 20,000 EGP · First tax-free bracket: first 40,000 EGP
labels.monthsHint: 13 or 14 months for companies paying holiday/bonus allowances

EgyptCalc.emptySubtitle: Results are based on the latest Egyptian tax laws 2025

results.socialInfo: Insurable wage capped between 2,000 and 14,500 EGP · Law 148/2019
results.vatInfo: Law 67/2016 · Standard rate 14% · Reduced rate 5% for certain goods
results.instapayInfo: InstaPay / Meeza — flat 2 EGP per transfer or a small percentage

ContractReview.title: Contract Review
ContractReview.subtitle: Paste the contract text and the AI agent will extract dangerous and missing clauses before you sign.
ContractReview.disclaimer: This analysis is for awareness and initial review only. Always consult a licensed attorney before signing any contract.
ContractReview.textPlaceholder: Paste the contract text here... (max 15,000 characters)
ContractReview.tooShortError: Text is too short — minimum 50 characters
ContractReview.specificConcernsPlaceholder: e.g. Concerned about the indemnity clause, want to verify termination terms...
ContractReview.footerDisclaimer: This analysis is for awareness only. Consult a licensed attorney before signing.

ArabicTemplates.title: Arabic Legal & Business Template Library

SetupEgypt.title: Setup in Egypt
SetupEgypt.subtitle: Step-by-step guide to incorporating your startup in Egypt

aiSection.title: Ask the Incorporation Advisor
aiSection.placeholder: e.g. What is the difference between an LLC and a JSC? Or: How do I register a tech company in Egypt?

SetupEgypt.disclaimer: This guide is for awareness purposes only. Incorporation laws change — always verify with a licensed attorney or the official GAFI portal before making any legal decision.

HR.title: HR Team
HR.subtitle: Automate hiring from role definition to screening, evaluating, and comparing multiple CVs with AI.

cvScreen.title: CV Screening & Comparison
cvScreen.desc: Upload up to 10 PDF files at once — Gemini analyses each CV individually then compares and ranks them.
cvScreen.dropZoneText: Drag PDF files or click to choose (up to 10 files)
